    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    H

    Hammer - Class in logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters
    Hammer melee character with slower but larger hitbox attack.
    Hammer() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Hammer
    Creates Hammer with default tuned stats and animation setup.
    Hammer(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Hammer
    Creates Hammer with custom stats.
    handleAttackSpeed() - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Unlocks next attack when attack-speed cooldown interval has elapsed.
    handleGameOver(Player, Player) - Method in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Handles end-of-match state transition and optional loser death animation.
    handleKeyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Handles key-press input for movement, attack, jump, reload, and skill activation.
    handleKeyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Handles key-release input and clears hold-state flags.
    HandleOwnWeapon - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Marker interface for characters that manage weapon rendering/behavior manually.
    hasKnockback() - Method in class logic.entity.BaseProjectileAttack
    Returns knockback flag.
    HaveWeapon - Interface in logic.interfaces
    Marker interface for characters that use a visible weapon sprite during attacks.
    HEALTH_BAR_SIDE_MARGIN - Static variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Side margin used to anchor HUD elements left and right.
    HEALTH_BAR_TOP_MARGIN - Static variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Top margin used for HUD placement.
    HealthBar - Class in component.scene2
    Displays a compact HealthBar
    HealthBar(int, String, boolean) - Constructor for class component.scene2.HealthBar
    Creates a new HealthBar
    height - Variable in class logic.entity.AttackData
    Hitbox height in pixels.
    HIT - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.PlayerState
    Temporary hit-reaction state.
    hitbox - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Collision hitbox used for combat intersection checks.
    HITBOX_DURATION - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Lifespan of temporary melee hitbox in nanoseconds.
    hitboxStartTime - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Timestamp when temporary attack hitbox became visible.
    hp - Variable in class logic.entity.Character
    Current hit points.
    HybridClass - Class in logic.entity.characterClass
    Base class for hybrid characters that combine melee/ranged traits.
    HybridClass() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Creates a hybrid character with default hybrid stats.
    HybridClass(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characterClass.HybridClass
    Creates a hybrid character with custom stats.
